items.summary: In the backend actor (backend/main.mo), implement the core grid trading loop that places real buy and sell orders via ICDex. For each cycle: (1) query current mid-price from ICDex, (2) calculate grid levels based on configured spread, numOrders, and orderSize, (3) cancel any existing open bot orders that are no longer aligned with the new grid (using the ICDex cancel endpoint), (4) place new buy orders below mid-price and sell orders above mid-price using the ICDex trade/order placement endpoint, (5) store placed order IDs in the open orders map, and (6) log each placed and cancelled order to the activity log. The loop must be driven by the existing recurring timer.

In the backend actor (backend/main.mo), implement a `pending` query method that returns all currently open orders tracked by the bot by reading from the open orders map. Replace any existing incorrect calls to retrieve open orders with this method.

Update the frontend `useQueries.ts` hook to call the backend `pending` method for fetching open orders, replacing any previous incorrect query. Ensure the OpenOrdersPanel continues to display the live list of open bot orders correctly.
